title: Segfault when a DEFAULT value contains a bind parameter
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(a TEXT, b TEXT);
INSERT INTO t1(a, b) VALUES('hello', NULL);
INSERT INTO t1(a, b) VALUES(NULL, NULL);
CREATE TABLE t2(c INTEGER, d TEXT);
INSERT INTO t2(c, d) VALUES(42, NULL);
key_bug_features: DEFAULT value contains a bind parameter
